resources.string: PlayTranslate uses the Accessibility Service to take screenshots of the game screen and show a floating overlay icon. No UI content, input events, or personal data are read or monitored.
For translating game text on screen

PlayTranslate needs the Accessibility permission to capture screenshots of the game screen on the top display while staying open on the bottom display.

PlayTranslate does not read any UI content, monitor input, or access any personal data — it only takes screenshots when you tap Translate or start live mode.

Go to Settings → Accessibility → Downloaded apps → PlayTranslate → Enable.
Enable PlayTranslate in Accessibility Settings first
Tap Translate to capture the game screen
Long-press Regions or Auto for quick-select menus
Your companion app for playing games in other languages.

Playing something you don\'t understand? Turn on-screen text into translations instantly.\n\nLearning a language? Word-by-word definitions, reading guides (furigana, pinyin), and one-tap Anki flashcards.

Android requires apps that run in the background to display a status bar notification while active.\n\nThis will never send alerts, sounds, or banners — only a quiet persistent indicator that PlayTranslate is running.

PlayTranslate needs to display over other apps to:
• Show translated text over your game
• Show the game screen controls
• Look up words by dragging over game text

From PlayTranslate\'s Android settings page, select the button on the top right with three dots (⋮) and then select \"Allow restricted settings\". After authenticating, you should be able to turn on accessibility permissions.
Sentences from Tatoeba · CC BY 2.0 FR
Offline translation isn\'t available on this device right now. Dictionary lookups and online translation still work.
%1$s needs a 64-bit device to recognize text, which this device isn\'t.
%1$s\n\nThis update is required — the installed version is no longer supported. Update now, or delete it to choose another language.
Offline translation for %1$s → %2$s isn\'t downloaded. The app still works online.
Select one or more screens. The screen you\'re viewing PlayTranslate on is skipped.
Paste your DeepL API key here
⚠ No internet connection — showing offline translation (lower quality).
⚠ Translation service unavailable — showing offline translation (lower quality).
⚠ Low memory — showing offline translation (lower quality).
Live mode isn\'t available with the current screen-capture method.
Live mode stopped — screen capture permission was denied.
Drag edges to restrict screen captures to this region
Drag the region box on the game screen to select your desired area. Drag the top or bottom edge, or drag the middle to move the whole box.
PlayTranslate needs permission to display over other apps so the floating game-screen controls can show on top of your game.
Drag over words for quick definitions
Tap to open the quick menu
The floating overlay icon requires the Accessibility permission to draw on the game screen.\n\nGo to Settings → Accessibility → Downloaded apps → PlayTranslate → Enable.
Changing screens or translating multiple screens at once requires the Accessibility permission. It lets PlayTranslate capture any display, not just the main one.
Setting hotkeys requires the Accessibility permission. It lets PlayTranslate detect the keys you press while gaming.
PlayTranslate uses these enhanced controls to improve the auto-translate experience.
This feature requires Android 11 or newer.
More readable, responsive, stable. Requires accessibility access.
Save words you discover while playing and review them later.\n\nPlayTranslate can save translated sentences, vocabulary, and screenshots directly to AnkiDroid, a free spaced-repetition flashcard app.
Are you a language learner? Create flashcards in %1$s from unknown words and sentences, and review them later using AnkiDroid, a free and popular spaced-repetition flashcard app.
To add flashcards to Anki, PlayTranslate needs permission to access AnkiDroid.\n\nTap Continue to grant this permission.
Permission denied — grant it in AnkiDroid settings
AnkiDroid didn\'t accept the card. Make sure AnkiDroid is running, then try again.
These words will be included in the Anki card. Tap a word to highlight them in the card. Tap × to remove it from the card.
No card types found in AnkiDroid
Card type no longer exists; using default
Configure fields for this card type before sending
Map a value to “%1$s” — Anki uses this field to identify the note, and empty values cause duplicate-rejection errors on send.
Couldn\'t reach AnkiDroid to look up card types. Try again in a moment.
Basic card types don\'t need a field mapping — Front and Back are filled automatically based on whether you\'re saving a word or a sentence.
PRO TIP: If you want to instantly create a card without editing, press and hold on any button that would normally take you to anki card creation page
Sends nothing — the Anki field stays empty.
The dictionary form of the highlighted word, no brackets. Example: 聞く
The dictionary form with per-kanji furigana brackets, for fields rendered through \{\{furigana:\}\}. Example: 聞[き]く
The pure-kana reading of the highlighted word. Example: きく
The source sentence with the highlighted word bolded. Example: 友達に聞いた
The source sentence with per-kanji furigana brackets, for fields rendered through \{\{furigana:\}\}. Example: 友達[ともだち]に聞[き]いた
The translation of the source sentence in your selected target language.
The dictionary definition(s) of the highlighted word, formatted as HTML.
Tatoeba example sentences for the highlighted word, when available.
A screenshot of the game screen, wrapped in markup ready for a Picture / Screenshot field.
Text-to-speech audio of the word, ready for a Word Audio field.
Text-to-speech audio of the sentence, ready for a Sentence Audio field.
Frequency rating of the highlighted word as stars. Example: ★★★
Part-of-speech tag for the highlighted word (word-mode cards only). Example: noun
A formatted list of every word PlayTranslate detected in the sentence, with readings and definitions.
Emits \"x\" on word-mode sends only — use for template fields like Migaku\'s “Is Vocabulary Card”.
Emits \"x\" on sentence-mode sends only — use for template fields like Lapis\'s or JPMN\'s “IsSentenceCard”.
Emits \"x\" on sentence sends that have a highlighted target word — use for JPMN\'s “IsTargetedSentenceCard”.
Always emits \"x\". Use for template fields you want unconditionally enabled.
The free plan includes 500,000 characters per month, but requires a credit card to sign up
DeepL is a translation service known for high-quality output, especially in European languages.
Couldn\'t fetch the model list. Check the API key, or type a model id via Custom….
%1$s rejected the key you entered. Double-check it at %2$s and try again.

Translations try each enabled service in the order shown, falling back when one is unavailable. Online translation services receive the captured text. Review each provider\'s privacy policy before enabling.

Offline translations are used as a fallback when online translations are unavailable. MLKit translations are bad, but the other options can be very slow and taxing, be weary of using them for auto translation.
Couldn\'t download the Firefox Translations model
It will stop translating this language pair offline. You can keep the downloaded model or delete it to free space.
Not supported for the current language pair
%1$s. Quality: %2$s. Speed: %3$s. Requires %4$s memory. %5$s on disk. %6$s. %7$s.
The %1$s model is installed. You can keep it for later or delete it to free up space.
Qwen 2.5 1.5B (MNN) is %1$s. This network is marked as metered. Continue?
The %1$s model is installed. You can keep it for later or delete it to free up space.
Qwen 3.5 2B is %1$s. This network is marked as metered. Continue?
The %1$s model is installed. You can keep it for later or delete it to free up space.
Gemma 4 E2B is %1$s. This network is marked as metered. Continue?
The %1$s model is installed. You can keep it for later or delete it to free up space.
Hunyuan-MT 1.5 is %1$s. This network is marked as metered. Continue?

Tencent's Hunyuan-MT 1.5 model is licensed under the Tencent HY Community License Agreement. This license excludes use within the European Union, United Kingdom, and South Korea.

By tapping "I Agree", you affirm and warrant that:

(1) You are not currently residing or located within the EU, UK, or South Korea.

(2) You will not use the outputs of this model to improve any other AI model (per §5(b) of the license).
Your older offline translators (Qwen and TranslateGemma) have been removed and replaced with faster MNN-based versions. Open Settings to enable the new translator.
Not supported on this device (requires an arm64 CPU)
Not supported on this device (requires at least %1$d GB RAM)
%1$s needs about %2$s of free memory to run. Right now only %3$s is free.\n\nClose other apps to free up memory, or cancel if this model isn\'t right for your device.
Low memory — translation quality is reduced
Hold to hide translations on game screen
Hold to show translations instead of %1$s
Hold to show %1$s on game screen
Hold to show translations on game screen
Drag finger to capture a specific area
What overlays to show during auto mode or hold-to-preview.
How often the game screen is captured during auto translation. Minimum: %1$s sec.
Ignored when more than one display is selected — overlays render on each.
Send the crash report to the developer? It includes a stack trace, recent app logs, and any text PlayTranslate has recently OCR\'d or looked up. No account info.

Steps to reproduce:

(Optional — describe what you were doing when this happened.)

Device info is included in the attached file.
A %1$s definition pack is available. Download it for word definitions in %2$s instead of English?
“Hide for Now” brings it back next time you open %1$s. “Turn Off” disables it until re-enabled in settings.

If PlayTranslate is having a hard time accurately reading the screen text, try experimenting with different selections. Different OCR tools may work better for different font types or text orientations.
This removes the %1$s model from this device. You can download it again later.
%1$s is also used by these languages. Deleting frees the space now; it\'ll download again next time you switch to one:\n\n%2$s
Couldn\'t download the OCR model. Check your connection and try again.
Download AnkiDroid free on Google Play
No speech engine is available. Tap to add one.
No text-to-speech engine is available to read words aloud. Install one — or, if your device already has an engine, enable it in Android\'s settings.
%1$s is the active engine, but doesn\'t support %2$s.
The active text-to-speech engine doesn\'t support %1$s.
Toggle PlayTranslate from your status bar
Get AnkiDroid free on Google Play
To add flashcards to Anki, %1$s needs permission to access AnkiDroid.
Get help and chat with other players.
A free, open source labor of love. Help keep it going.
Type a word to look it up
Share recent logs for a bug report
